Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT HSS INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
